trans-unit.source: {0} depends on {1}, it will be added automatically.
trans-unit.target: {0} 依賴 {1},将自動添加。

trans-unit.source: {0} requires {1}, you should add it manually.
trans-unit.target: {0} 需要 {1},請手動添加。

trans-unit.source: {0} suggests adding {1}.
The request contains an invalid argument.
trans-unit.target: 請求包含無效的引數。

trans-unit.source: Unable to resolve tenant for the current request.
trans-unit.target: 無法解析目前請求的租戶。

trans-unit.source: The request cannot be executed in the current system state.
trans-unit.target: 在目前系統狀態下無法執行該請求。

trans-unit.source: The request does not have valid authentication credentials.
trans-unit.target: 請求未提供有效的身分驗證認證。

trans-unit.source: You do not have permission to perform this action.
trans-unit.target: 您沒有執行此操作的權限。

trans-unit.source: The requested resource was not found.
trans-unit.target: 找不到請求的資源。

trans-unit.source: The resource already exists.
trans-unit.target: 資源已存在。

trans-unit.source: A concurrency conflict occurred while saving to the database.
trans-unit.target: 儲存到資料庫時發生並行衝突。

trans-unit.source: One or more validation errors occurred.
trans-unit.target: 發生一項或多項驗證錯誤。

trans-unit.source: Rate limit exceeded.
trans-unit.target: 超出速率限制。

trans-unit.source: {0} '{1}' not found.
An error occurred.
trans-unit.target: 發生錯誤。

trans-unit.source: '{0}' must not be empty.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' 不能為空。

trans-unit.source: Unsupported algorithm: {0}.
trans-unit.target: 不支持的算法:{0}。

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not supported.
'{0}' is not configured.
Application has no sector identifier URI and no redirect URIs.
trans-unit.target: 應用程序未提供 sector identifier URI,也没有重定向 URI。

trans-unit.source: Cannot resolve a resource name without a pattern.
trans-unit.target: 没有模式则无法解析资源名稱。

trans-unit.source: Invalid table name '{0}' of type '{1}'.
Entity must have at least one [TableKey].
trans-unit.target: 實體必须至少有一個 [TableKey]。

trans-unit.source: Entity key count mismatch.
trans-unit.target: 實體鍵數量不匹配。

trans-unit.source: Cannot resolve parameter '{0}' of type '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: 无法解析類型 '{1}' 的參數 '{0}'。

trans-unit.source: Cannot resolve parameter '{0}' of method '{1}' on type '{2}'.
trans-unit.target: 无法解析類型 '{2}' 上方法 '{1}' 的參數 '{0}'。

trans-unit.source: Unable to convert '{0}' to {1}.
trans-unit.target: 无法将 '{0}' 转換为 {1}。

trans-unit.source: Mapping for field {0} is missing a source field.
trans-unit.target: 字段 {0} 的映射缺少源字段。

trans-unit.source: Tenant is not initialized successfully.
trans-unit.target: 租户未成功初始化。

trans-unit.source: Entry assembly is null.
trans-unit.target: 入口程序集为 null。

trans-unit.source: The type {0} does not implement {1}.
trans-unit.target: 類型 {0} 未實现 {1}。

trans-unit.source: Invalid request payload.
trans-unit.target: 無效的請求承載。

trans-unit.source: Cross-parent operation is not supported for '{parent}'.
trans-unit.target: 不支援針對 '{parent}' 的跨父資源操作。

trans-unit.source: The page token is invalid or has expired.
trans-unit.target: 页面令牌无效或已過期。

trans-unit.source: The {0} expression is malformed.
trans-unit.target: {0} 表達式格式不正確。

trans-unit.source: Invalid field.
trans-unit.target: 无效的字段。

trans-unit.source: Invalid field name '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: 无效的字段名稱 '{0}'。

trans-unit.source: Function '{0}' not registered.
trans-unit.target: 函數 '{0}' 未註冊。

trans-unit.source: The page_size must not be negative.
trans-unit.target: page_size 不能为负數。

trans-unit.source: The parent '{parent}' is invalid.
trans-unit.target: 父資源 '{parent}' 無效。

trans-unit.source: The user manager must produce an authenticator key after reset.
trans-unit.target: 重置后用户管理器必须生成验證器密鑰。

trans-unit.source: The client credentials are missing or invalid.
trans-unit.target: 客户端凭据缺失或无效。

trans-unit.source: Client secret is required for confidential clients.
trans-unit.target: 机密客户端需要客户端密鑰。

trans-unit.source: The request uses more than one client authentication method.
trans-unit.target: 請求使用了多种客户端身份验證方式。

trans-unit.source: The provided grant is invalid, expired, or revoked.
trans-unit.target: 提供的授權無效、已過期或已撤銷。

trans-unit.source: The code_verifier does not match the code_challenge.
trans-unit.target: code_verifier 与 code_challenge 不匹配。

trans-unit.source: The requested scope is not allowed for this client.
trans-unit.target: 此客户端不允许使用所請求的范围。

trans-unit.source: The client is not authorized to use this grant type.
trans-unit.target: 此客户端未被授权使用該授权類型。

trans-unit.source: The resource owner or authorization server denied the request.
trans-unit.target: 資源擁有者或授權伺服器拒絕了請求。

trans-unit.source: The redirect_uri does not match any registered URI.
trans-unit.target: redirect_uri 与任何已註冊的 URI 都不匹配。

trans-unit.source: User consent is required.
trans-unit.target: 需要使用者同意。

trans-unit.source: User authentication is required.
trans-unit.target: 需要使用者身分驗證。

trans-unit.source: The authorization request is still pending.
trans-unit.target: 授權請求仍在等待中。

trans-unit.source: The polling interval is too short. Increase the interval and retry.
trans-unit.target: 轮询间隔過短,請增大间隔后重試。

trans-unit.source: An internal server error occurred.
trans-unit.target: 發生內部伺服器錯誤。

trans-unit.source: The '{0}' prompt value cannot be combined with other values.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' prompt 值不能与其他值组合使用。

trans-unit.source: The '{0}' prompt value is not supported for this client.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' prompt 值不被此客户端支持。

trans-unit.source: A valid user identity is required for this request.
trans-unit.target: 此請求需要有效的用户身份。

trans-unit.source: {0} is enabled but {1} is not set.
trans-unit.target: {0} 已啟用,但 {1} 未設置。

trans-unit.source: {0} must be an absolute URI.
trans-unit.target: {0} 必须是绝对 URI。

trans-unit.source: {0} is set but {1} is not set.
trans-unit.target: {0} 已設置,但 {1} 未設置。

trans-unit.source: Unable to resolve {0}.
trans-unit.target: 无法解析 {0}。

trans-unit.source: The filter expression is invalid.
trans-unit.target: filter 運算式無效。

trans-unit.source: The update_mask path '{path}' is invalid: {reason}.
trans-unit.target: update_mask 路徑 '{path}' 無效:{reason}。

trans-unit.source: The read_mask path '{path}' is invalid: {reason}.
trans-unit.target: read_mask 路徑 '{path}' 無效:{reason}。

trans-unit.source: The requested resource name '{name}' is invalid.
trans-unit.target: 請求的資源名稱 '{name}' 無效。

trans-unit.source: The order_by expression is invalid.
trans-unit.target: order_by 運算式無效。

trans-unit.source: '{value}' does not resolve to any registered resource type.
trans-unit.target: '{value}' 無法解析為任何已註冊的資源類型。

trans-unit.source: Back-channel logout requires Scheduling.
trans-unit.target: 反向通道登出需要 Scheduling 模組。

trans-unit.source: Process name is required.
trans-unit.target: 流程名稱是必填項。

trans-unit.source: Process definition '{name}' is already registered.
trans-unit.target: 流程定義 '{name}' 已經註冊。

trans-unit.source: Process definition '{name}' is not registered.
trans-unit.target: 流程定義 '{name}' 未註冊。

trans-unit.source: Flow runtime '{engine}' is not registered with the host.
trans-unit.target: Flow 執行時期 '{engine}' 未在主機上註冊。

trans-unit.source: Message '{name}' is not defined on the process.
trans-unit.target: 流程未定義訊息 '{name}'。

trans-unit.source: Source '{name}' was modified concurrently; the flow transition was aborted.
trans-unit.target: 源 '{name}' 被並行修改;流程轉換已中止。

trans-unit.source: Flow timer job is missing the '{variable}' variable.
trans-unit.target: 流程計時器作業缺少 '{variable}' 變數。

trans-unit.source: Process '{name}' reached a timer catch, which requires Scheduling.
trans-unit.target: 流程 '{name}' 抵達計時器捕獲,需要 Scheduling 模組。

trans-unit.source: Access to source '{name}' is denied.
trans-unit.target: 拒絕存取源 '{name}'。

trans-unit.source: Operation '{name}' has already finished.
trans-unit.target: 操作 '{name}' 已經完成。

trans-unit.source: Process definition has no start event.
trans-unit.target: 流程定義沒有起始事件。

trans-unit.source: Start event must have exactly one outgoing sequence flow.
trans-unit.target: 起始事件必须有且仅有一個出向序列流。

trans-unit.source: State machine requires exactly one start event.
trans-unit.target: 狀態機需要有且僅有一個起始事件。

trans-unit.source: State machine requires at least one end event.
trans-unit.target: 狀態機至少需要一個結束事件。

trans-unit.source: Trigger '{trigger}' is not valid from state '{state}'.
trans-unit.target: 觸發器 '{trigger}' 在狀態 '{state}' 下無效。

trans-unit.source: Current state '{state}' is not defined on the process.
trans-unit.target: 流程中未定義目前狀態 '{state}'。

trans-unit.source: Gateway '{name}' is not supported by the state machine engine.
trans-unit.target: 狀態機引擎不支援閘道 '{name}'。

trans-unit.source: Gateway '{name}' is not supported by the state machine engine. Only exclusive and event-based gateways are supported.
trans-unit.target: 狀態機引擎不支援閘道 '{name}'。僅支援獨佔與基於事件的閘道。

trans-unit.source: Cyclic auto-flow detected at element '{name}'; the process cannot reach a stable state.
trans-unit.target: 在元素 '{name}' 处检测到循环自動流;流程无法達到稳定状態。

trans-unit.source: Unknown target element '{name}'.
trans-unit.target: 未知的目標元素 '{name}'。

trans-unit.source: Activity '{name}' is not supported by the state machine engine.
trans-unit.target: 状態机引擎不支持活動 '{name}'。

trans-unit.source: Activity '{name}' has loop characteristics which are not supported by the state machine engine.
trans-unit.target: 活動 '{name}' 带有循环特征,状態机引擎不支持。

trans-unit.source: Element '{name}' is not reachable from the start event.
trans-unit.target: 元素 '{name}' 從起始事件不可達。

trans-unit.source: Sequence flow '{id}' has no source element.
trans-unit.target: 序列流 '{id}' 没有源元素。

trans-unit.source: Sequence flow '{id}' has no target element.
trans-unit.target: 序列流 '{id}' 没有目標元素。

trans-unit.source: Sequence flow '{id}' references unknown source element '{source}'.
trans-unit.target: 序列流 '{id}' 引用了未知的源元素 '{source}'。

trans-unit.source: Sequence flow '{id}' references unknown target element '{target}'.
trans-unit.target: 序列流 '{id}' 引用了未知的目標元素 '{target}'。

trans-unit.source: End event '{name}' must not have outgoing flows.
trans-unit.target: 结束事件 '{name}' 不得有出向流。

trans-unit.source: Event-based gateway '{name}' has Parallel=true, which is not supported by the state machine engine. Only exclusive mode (Parallel=false) is supported.
trans-unit.target: 基于事件的網關 '{name}' 設置了 Parallel=true,状態机引擎不支持。仅支持排他模式(Parallel=false)。

trans-unit.source: Event-based gateway '{name}' must have at least one outgoing flow.
trans-unit.target: 基于事件的網關 '{name}' 必须至少有一個出向流。

trans-unit.source: Event-based gateway '{name}' outgoing flow must target an IntermediateCatchEvent.
trans-unit.target: 基于事件的網關 '{name}' 的出向流必须指向 IntermediateCatchEvent。

trans-unit.source: Exclusive gateway '{name}' must have at least one outgoing flow.
trans-unit.target: 排他網關 '{name}' 必须至少有一個出向流。

trans-unit.source: Boundary event '{name}' is not attached to any activity.
trans-unit.target: 边界事件 '{name}' 未附加到任何活動。

trans-unit.source: Boundary event '{name}' is attached to unknown activity.
trans-unit.target: 边界事件 '{name}' 附加到未知的活動。

trans-unit.source: Boundary event '{name}' is non-interrupting, which is not supported by the state machine engine.
trans-unit.target: 边界事件 '{name}' 是非中斷的,状態机引擎不支持。

trans-unit.source: Boundary event '{name}' must have exactly one outgoing flow.
trans-unit.target: 边界事件 '{name}' 必须有且仅有一個出向流。

trans-unit.source: Intermediate catch event '{name}' must have at least one outgoing flow.
trans-unit.target: 中间捕获事件 '{name}' 必须至少有一個出向流。

trans-unit.source: Intermediate catch event '{name}' can only be reached from an EventBasedGateway.
trans-unit.target: 中间捕获事件 '{name}' 只能從 EventBasedGateway 到達。

trans-unit.source: Activity '{name}' has no outgoing flow and cannot proceed. Route it to an end event or another element.
trans-unit.target: 活動 '{name}' 没有出向流,无法繼續。請将其连接到结束事件或其他元素。

trans-unit.source: Activity '{name}' has mixed outgoing paths (direct and gateway). Each activity can have at most one outgoing path type.
trans-unit.target: 活動 '{name}' 有混合的出向路径(直接与網關)。每個活動最多只能有一种出向路径類型。

trans-unit.source: Activity '{name}' has mixed outgoing paths (end event and other). Each activity can have at most one outgoing path type.
trans-unit.target: 活動 '{name}' 有混合的出向路径(结束事件与其他)。每個活動最多只能有一种出向路径類型。

trans-unit.source: Activity '{name}' has multiple direct outgoing flows to activities. An activity can have at most one direct outgoing flow.
trans-unit.target: 活動 '{name}' 有多個直接通向其他活動的出向流。一個活動最多只能有一条直接出向流。
